_meta.name: Brain OS channel prompt profiles example
_meta.note: OpenClaw does not need a separate per-channel prompt field when you bind each channel to a dedicated agent workspace. Put channel-specific instructions in that agent workspace's AGENTS.md / references/ files.
_meta.advanced_note: agents.list[].systemPromptOverride exists, but it replaces the assembled system prompt. Prefer workspace bootstrap files unless you intentionally need a full override.

identity.name: Knowledge Librarian
identity.theme: article ingestion, retrieval, and knowledge synthesis

identity.name: Personal Ops Driver
identity.theme: daily planning, todos, commitments, and reminders

identity.name: OSS Sync Agent
identity.theme: public Brain OS repo updates, de-identification, PRs, and release notes

list.name: Strict Prompt Experiment Agent
list.systemPromptOverride: You are a narrowly scoped Brain OS experiment agent. Only answer about {{EXPERIMENT_SCOPE}}. If asked for anything else, say it is out of scope. This is a full system prompt override; use only when you intentionally want to replace the normal OpenClaw assembled prompt.
